fixesDuringExamination.summary: Changed the platform-admin raw panel classification from engine-internal to admin-facing and replaced tenant-facing freedom-config changelog copy with plain setting-change wording.
Expanded FLOW-32 C6 role screenshots from anonymous and freelancer only to all ten roles named in the FLOW-32 mobility/auth state.

verification.name: FLOW-32 CRUD and mock-state screenshot matrix after admin-facing classification
verification.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5177'; npx playwright test e2e/sharable-flows-marketplace-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/sharable-flows-marketplace-crud.spec.ts --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: expanded FLOW-32 C6 role matrix after copy fix
verification.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5178'; npx playwright test e2e/c6-role-coverage-runs-22-44.spec.ts -g "C6-R32" --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: visible-copy internal-code scan
verification.command: rg forbidden human-language patterns client/src/pages/sharable-flows-marketplace client/e2e FLOW-32 files
